top_signals.title: Aluminum Advances to Four-Year High on Tighter Global Market
top_signals.summary: Aluminum rose for a fourth day to hit its highest since 2022, extending this year’s powerful gain as US President Donald Trump struggles to keep peace talks with Iran on track.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Foreign Ownership of Indian Shares Tumbles to 10-Year Low
top_signals.summary: International investors now hold less than 15% of Indian equities.

top_signals.title: Bluesky bets on the end of X and Meta’s social media grip
top_signals.summary: Social media is moving beyond platforms controlled by a “few billionaires”, according to Bluesky’s chief operating officer, as governments in the UK and Europe step up scrutiny of X, Meta, and other Big Techs. Speaking at SXSW London, Rose Wang said Bluesky was built in response to a social media market dominated by a handful [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Australian LNG union begins strikes at Tokyo-based Inpex’s Ichthys plant
top_signals.summary: Ichthys accounts for about 2% of global output for liquefied natural gas and has the capacity to export around 9.3 million tons a year, mainly to Japan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Microsoft investigates Office Apps, Teams file access issues
top_signals.summary: Microsoft says an ongoing incident is preventing users of its Teams collaboration platform and Office for the web cloud-based productivity suite from opening files. [...]
